categories.name: Financial
categories.description: Institutions managing monetary assets, banking, credit, tax reporting, and wealth management.

categories.name: Health
categories.description: Medical providers, pharmacies, dental, insurance EOBs, and wellness or fitness services.

categories.name: Publications
categories.description: Editorial content, newsletters, news aggregators, and digital magazines.

categories.name: Gaming
categories.description: Video game storefronts, tabletop game publishers, and gaming communities.

categories.name: Productivity
categories.description: SaaS tools for workflow, task management, collaboration, automated system notifications, server logs, and security protocols.

categories.name: Shopping
categories.description: Retail merchants, e-commerce platforms, and digital storefronts delivering physical goods or one-off digital purchases.

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: Essential residential or infrastructure services, including telecommunications, electricity, water, and waste management.

categories.name: Personal
categories.description: Direct, 1-to-1 communications from individual human beings, family members, and personal friends.

categories.name: Streaming
categories.description: Digital entertainment platforms, video/audio streaming subscriptions, and media services.

categories.name: Dining
categories.description: Restaurants, food delivery networks, coffee shops, and dining reservations.

categories.name: Government
categories.description: Federal, state, and local municipal authorities, including the DMV, postal services, and regulatory agencies.

categories.name: Business
categories.description: Employer communications, professional associations, HR portals, and B2B operational contacts.

categories.name: Travel & Transit
categories.description: Travel logistics, airlines, hotel accommodations, ride-sharing, and transit authorities.

categories.name: Education
categories.description: Schools, academic institutions, and student educational programs.

categories.name: Activities
categories.description: In-person events, dance studios, concerts, and recreational activities excluding digital streaming.
